hero_pitch:
I don't just run marketing campaigns. I build digital ecosystems that drive growth.
Over 10+ years across healthcare, lifestyle, finance, hospitality, consumer brands & others, I've combined paid media, data-driven strategies, content, social, CRM and analytics to turn marketing into measurable business results - generating leads, growing revenue and building brands that scale.
about_body1: Over the last decade, I've worked across strategy, paid media, content, CRM, websites and analytics to help businesses acquire customers, increase conversions and drive sustainable revenue growth.
contact_roles: Open to Head of Growth, VP Growth, CMO and fractional leadership roles. I respond personally within 48 hours — no sales funnels, no gatekeepers.
about_body2: My approach focuses on the entire customer journey, not just individual channels. From attracting qualified audiences and generating demand to improving conversion rates and customer retention, I connect marketing activities into a cohesive growth strategy designed to deliver measurable business outcomes.
about_body3: Whether launching a new product, scaling lead generation or strengthening brand presence, I combine commercial thinking, creative execution and data-driven decision making to turn marketing investment into long-term business value.
